title: Chapter 107
content:
Hey there, guys! Sorry for such a long break. I know many of you might have been disappointed, and some might be angry as well.

Well, I had my reasons for that long break. While not all of it was associated with the loss of motivation from having my work stolen, I wouldn't say it didn't play a major part.

If anyone's interested, I've uploaded the reason on my Patreon so you can check it from there.

Now, without wasting the word count, let's begin.

~~

Chapter 107

But her body betrayed her. She, like her mother, also wanted to be treated like that. Like an inferior being. Like a pet.

She kept moaning, but instead of pushing me away, she pulled me in and made sure I never left her pussy. But I could sense something else going on in her. A turmoil. It appeared that her mind had not truly escaped from this conflicting situation.

The gears in her mind were churning. I could tell what she was thinking even without reading her mind.

She was calling back to her childhood. Who was she? She grew up with a normal status, not too high, and not too low. Her talent was amazing, and everyone revered her. Even the more senior members of the aristocracy desired to marry her into their families in order to elevate their own status.

She was pretty from day one, and with age, she only grew prettier. While sexual feelings weren’t involved, it did make sense to marry a woman who was beautiful and well accomplished. That was until she met my brother, though. I didn’t know what she saw in him, but she was attracted to him.

Or perhaps, it was something else. Something else was coming to her mind now. No, more accurately, someone else.

However, her mind was once again going through turmoil. She realized that Sandra’s reaction was normal. If she had been hit, she should have also reacted the same way. But she didn’t.

And what she did next only made me chuckle.

~~

Let me know if there are any mistakes.
